title: Prove Fp field axioms and Montgomery correctness in Lean4
description: Prove Fp satisfies Mathlib CommRing/Field typeclass for any prime P. Prove Montgomery roundtrip and redc correctness. Proofs in proofs/GF2Core/Proofs/FpField.lean and MontgomeryRoundtrip.lean. Success criteria: lake build compiles all proofs.
